     The Numbers Business Report

Reagan (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $29,397,140Details
International Box Office $44,949
Worldwide Box Office $29,442,089
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $830,534
Total $830,534
Further financial details...

Synopsis

From dusty small-town roots, to the glitter of Hollywood, and then on to commanding the world stage, REAGAN is a cinematic journey of overcoming the odds. Told through the voice of Viktor Petrovich, a former KGB agent whose life becomes inextricably linked with Ronald Reagan’s when Reagan first caught the Soviets’ attention as an actor in Hollywood, this film offers a perspective as unique as it is captivating.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,650,720 (26.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.84 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,754 opening theaters/2,770 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $31,086,635

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 30th, 2024 (Wide) by ShowBiz Direct
International Releases: October 10th, 2024 (Limited) (Portugal)
October 24th, 2024 (Limited) (Croatia)
October 25th, 2024 (Limited) (Spain)
Video Release: October 15th, 2024 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violent content and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2848 (cert #55133), 8/21/2024)
Running Time: 135 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Oklahoma, United States
Plot point: Biography, Political, Politicians
Social setting: Cold War
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: MJM Entertainment Group, Rawhide Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
